title: Add Pixel-Colony-God to games
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Pixel-Colony-God](https://github.com/yava-code/Pixel-Colony-God) to games
- Runs a sandbox web game using pollinations.

Fixes #10006

gist.headline: Playing God in pixels
gist.blurb: A brand new sandbox web game called Pixel-Colony-God just landed in our community apps. Time to build, manage, and rule your own tiny pixelated world powered by Pollinations!
gist.summary: Added the community-built sandbox web game Pixel-Colony-God to the apps showcase and Greenhouse directory.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and play Pixel-Colony-God, a new AI-powered sandbox game, directly from the community apps list.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a benevolent 'god' over a tiny sandbox colony. She could be wearing a tiny toga or holding a small staff, looking down at a miniature world of tiny pixel buildings and villagers.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny toga, looking down proudly at a miniature sandbox world filled with tiny pixelated buildings and villagers. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny toga, looking down proudly at a miniature sandbox world filled with tiny pixelated buildings and villagers. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
